message:
feat(codec): add framed I/O primitives and bytes codec

Introduce a complete framed I/O layer for length-delimited transport:
- BytesCodec: simple pass-through codec for raw byte buffers
- Framed: bidirectional adapter combining FramedRead + FramedWrite
- FramedRead: streaming decoder that buffers incoming bytes and
  yields frames via a configurable codec
- FramedWrite: streaming encoder that frames outgoing items through
  a codec before writing to the underlying transport

These primitives support the distributed communication layer by
providing reliable message framing over byte streams, mirroring
the tokio-util framed I/O pattern but tailored to asupersync's
symbol-native transport needs.

The existing codec/mod.rs gains re-exports for the new types and
updated trait bounds to support the framed adapters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
